title: olearia gravis
intro: Olearia gravis is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, commonly known as tree daisy due to its shrub-like appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Olearia gravis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Olearia gravis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
